task_completion.description: Create 'District Resources' folder in Favorites Bar
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Microsoft Edge's Favorites manager or dropdown, a folder named 'District Resources' is visible under the Favorites Bar.

task_completion.description: Create three specific sub-folders inside 'District Resources'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'District Resources' folder, three sub-folders are visible: 'Math & STEM Tools', 'Literacy & Reading', and 'Reference & Research'.
The 'Math & STEM Tools' folder contains bookmarks for Khan Academy, Desmos Graphing Calculator, and PhET Interactive Simulations.
The 'Literacy & Reading' folder contains bookmarks for CommonLit, Newsela, and ReadWorks.
The 'Reference & Research' folder contains bookmarks for National Geographic Education, NASA STEM Engagement, and Library of Congress Teachers.

task_completion.description: Export bookmarks to HTML file on Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'district_bookmarks.html' is visible on the Desktop or in a file manager viewing the /home/ga/Desktop/ directory.

task_completion.description: Create instructions text file with email content
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text file named 'bookmark_instructions.txt' is visible on the Desktop. Its contents (visible in a text editor) include an email to teachers, list the three resource categories, and explain how to import the HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent used Microsoft Edge to organize bookmarks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Microsoft Edge browser and its Favorites manager, rather than directly editing bookmark configuration files.

integrity.description: Bookmarks were exported using the browser's export feature
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Edge 'Export favorites' dialog or process, rather than the agent manually typing HTML code to fake the export file.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI text editor for the instructions file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a GUI text editor (like gedit, mousepad, or nano in a terminal) being used to write the email, rather than just copying pre-written text from a script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The bookmarks must be organized in Microsoft Edge under the Favorites Bar in a parent folder 'District Resources'. The three sub-folders are 'Math & STEM Tools' (Khan Academy, Desmos, PhET), 'Literacy & Reading' (CommonLit, Newsela, ReadWorks), and 'Reference & Research' (National Geographic Education, NASA STEM Engagement, Library of Congress Teachers). The export file must be 'district_bookmarks.html' on the Desktop. The instructions file must be 'bookmark_instructions.txt' on the Desktop, containing an email listing the 3 categories and import instructions.
